content: Integrating the ICM intrinsic curiosity mechanism into active agentic retrieval systems creates self-improving search agents that proactively explore under-retrieved knowledge gaps instead of only passively answering user-decomposed subqueries. This hybrid system would generate intrinsic reward for discovering novel, unanticipated information connections that address implicit user needs uncaught by static query decomposition.
source_topics: Active Agentic Retrieval with Search Agents
trigger_topic: Active Agentic Retrieval with Search Agents
